mapper.select: SELECT b.*, GROUP_CONCAT(c.`name`) AS categoryName, COUNT(bc.`id`) AS availableQuantity FROM `dodamdodam`.`books` b LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_categories` bcat ON b.`id` = bcat.`book_id` LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`categories` c ON bcat.`category_id` = c.`id` LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_copies` bc ON b.`id` = bc.`book_id` AND bc.`status` = 'AVAILABLE' WHERE b.`id` IN ( SELECT `book_id` FROM `dodamdodam`.`book_likes` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} ) GROUP BY b.`id` ORDER BY (SELECT `created_at` FROM `dodamdodam`.`book_likes` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} AND `book_id` = b.`id`) DESC
